name: retreat_while_eating
description: Move to the specified x,z coordinates while eating bread from inventory until hunger is full or bread runs out. Keeps relocating while healing to avoid remaining hostiles.
parameters: z.object({ destination: z.object({ x: z.number().describe('The x coordinate to retreat to'), z: z.number().describe('The z coordinate to retreat to') }).describe('The target x and z coordinates to move toward while eating bread') })
